history.en: One of four types of Swiss Mountain Dogs originating in the canton of Bern. Served as all-purpose farm dogs for droving cattle, pulling carts to market, and watchdogs. Nearly extinct by early 1900s but revived through careful breeding programs
history.zh: 四种瑞士山地犬之一，起源于伯尔尼州。用作多用途农场犬，用于驱赶牛群、拉车到市场以及看门。20世纪初几乎灭绝，但通过精心育种计划得以复兴。

overview.en: The Bernese Mountain Dog is a large, sturdy working breed known for its calm, gentle, and loyal temperament. They are intelligent, affectionate, and good-natured, making them excellent family companions. Originally from Switzerland, they were used as all-purpose farm dogs for herding, carting, and guarding. Their striking tri-color coat and sweet expression belie a strong, confident nature. Bernese are patient with children and generally get along with other pets, but they thrive on human companionship and do not do well when left alone for long periods. They are moderately active indoors but require regular outdoor exercise. Early socialization is important to ensure they grow into well-mannered adults.
overview.zh: 伯恩山犬是一种大型、结实的工作犬，以其冷静、温和和忠诚的性格而闻名。它们聪明、深情、脾气好，是优秀的家庭伴侣。原产于瑞士，曾被用作多功能农场犬，负责放牧、拉车和看守。它们引人注目的三色被毛和甜美的表情掩盖了其强壮、自信的本性。伯恩山犬对儿童耐心，通常与其他宠物相处融洽，但它们非常依赖人类的陪伴，不能长时间独处。它们在室内适度活跃，但需要定期户外运动。早期社会化对于确保它们成长为举止得体的成年犬非常重要。

care.en: Daily care for a Bernese Mountain Dog includes thorough grooming due to their thick double coat, which sheds heavily. Brush at least 2-3 times per week, and daily during shedding seasons. Bathe every 2-3 months or as needed. Exercise is crucial; they need at least 30-60 minutes of moderate activity daily, such as walks, hikes, or play sessions. Avoid strenuous exercise in hot weather due to their heat sensitivity. Regular vet visits for vaccinations, parasite control, and health screenings are essential. Common health issues include hip and elbow dysplasia, bloat, and certain cancers. Ear cleaning, nail trimming, and dental care should be part of the routine.
care.zh: 伯恩山犬的日常护理包括彻底梳理其厚重的双层被毛，掉毛量很大。每周至少刷毛2-3次，换毛季节每天刷。每2-3个月或根据需要洗澡一次。运动至关重要；它们每天需要至少30-60分钟的适度活动，如散步、远足或玩耍。由于对热敏感，避免在炎热天气进行剧烈运动。定期看兽医进行疫苗接种、寄生虫控制和健康检查是必要的。常见健康问题包括髋关节和肘关节发育不良、胃扭转以及某些癌症。清洁耳朵、修剪指甲和牙齿护理应成为日常习惯。

training.en: Bernese Mountain Dogs are intelligent and eager to please, making them responsive to positive reinforcement training methods. Use rewards like treats, praise, and play. They can be sensitive, so avoid harsh corrections. Start training early with basic obedience and socialization. They excel in activities like carting, agility, and therapy work. Consistency and patience are key; Bernese may have a stubborn streak, but they respond well to firm, gentle guidance. Keep sessions short and fun to maintain their interest. Crate training can help with housebreaking and provide a safe space. Early socialization with people, dogs, and new environments is crucial to prevent shyness or fearfulness.
training.zh: 伯恩山犬聪明且渴望取悦，因此对积极强化训练方法反应良好。使用零食、表扬和玩耍作为奖励。它们可能敏感，因此避免严厉的纠正。早期开始训练，包括基本服从和社会化。它们在拉车、敏捷性和治疗犬等活动中表现出色。一致性和耐心是关键；伯恩山犬可能有些固执，但坚定而温和的引导效果很好。保持训练简短有趣以维持它们的兴趣。笼内训练有助于家庭训练并提供安全空间。早期与人、其他犬和新环境的社会化对于防止害羞或恐惧至关重要。

diet.en: Feed a high-quality, large-breed dog food appropriate for their age, size, and activity level. Bernese Mountain Dogs are prone to bloat, so feed two or three smaller meals per day rather than one large meal, and avoid vigorous exercise immediately after eating. Monitor weight closely to prevent obesity, which stresses joints. Include glucosamine and chondroitin supplements for joint health, especially as they age. Ensure fresh water is always available. Treats should be given in moderation. Some Bernese may have food allergies; consult your vet if you notice skin or digestive issues. Puppies need a diet formulated for large-breed growth to support proper bone development.
diet.zh: 喂食适合其年龄、体型和活动水平的高品质大型犬狗粮。伯恩山犬容易胃扭转，因此每天分两到三餐喂食，而不是一餐大量喂食，并避免饭后立即剧烈运动。密切监测体重以防肥胖，肥胖会加重关节负担。添加葡萄糖胺和软骨素补充剂以维护关节健康，特别是随着年龄增长。确保随时有新鲜饮水。零食应适量。部分伯恩山犬可能有食物过敏；如果发现皮肤或消化问题，请咨询兽医。幼犬需要专为大型犬生长配制的饮食，以支持骨骼正常发育。

livingTips.en: Bernese Mountain Dogs are best suited to homes with fenced yards where they can roam safely. They can adapt to apartment living if given sufficient exercise, but they need space to stretch. They are excellent with children and generally good with other dogs and pets when socialized early. Their calm nature makes them great family dogs, but they are not ideal for first-time owners due to their size and potential health issues. They prefer cooler climates and may struggle in hot, humid environments. Provide a comfortable indoor bed and avoid leaving them alone for long hours as they can develop separation anxiety. Regular mental stimulation through puzzle toys or training is beneficial.
livingTips.zh: 伯恩山犬最适合有围栏院子的家庭，它们可以在那里安全地活动。如果给予足够的运动，它们也能适应公寓生活，但需要空间伸展。它们对儿童非常友善，如果早期社会化，通常与其他狗和宠物相处良好。它们冷静的性格使它们成为优秀的家庭犬，但由于体型和潜在的健康问题，不太适合初次养狗的人。它们更喜欢凉爽的气候，在炎热潮湿的环境中可能感到不适。提供舒适的室内床，避免长时间独处，因为它们可能产生分离焦虑。通过益智玩具或训练提供定期精神刺激有益。
